data-source.name: Create a modern, premium ride-sharing web application with smooth animations inspired by high-end websites like Sheryians Coding School. 🎨 DESIGN STYLE: - Soft peach gradient accents (#FF9A9E to #FECFEF) - Light ivory/white background with glassmorphism UI - Rounded corners (16px–24px), soft shadows, clean spacing - Professional startup-level design (not cartoonish) ⚡ CORE ANIMATION SYSTEM: 1. Smooth Scrolling: - Implement smooth scrolling with subtle parallax effects (Locomotive Scroll or equivalent) - Elements should move at different speeds to create depth 2. Page Transitions: - Use smooth transitions between pages (Framer Motion style) - Effects: fade + slide + slight scale - Login → Dashboard transition should feel seamless 3. Cursor Interaction (Desktop Only): - Add custom cursor with hover effects - Buttons and cards should have magnetic or scale interaction 4. Text Reveal Animation: - Animate headings using split text reveal (letter/word animation) - Smooth entrance for hero text 5. Hover & Depth Effects: - Cards lift on hover with shadow increase - Buttons scale slightly with smooth easing - Add subtle glow on important elements 6. Micro Interactions: - Input focus glow - OTP input auto-focus and smooth transition - Button click ripple or feedback - Toggle switches with smooth transitions 7. Glassmorphism UI: - Use blur (backdrop-blur) with transparent cards - Maintain soft layered depth 🚗 RIDE-SHARE SPECIFIC UI: Homepage: - Hero section with 3D car or illustration and floating map pins - CTA: Book Ride, Become Driver - Feature cards (Fast Booking, Live Tracking, Secure Payments) - Scroll-based reveal animations for each section (fade-up + stagger) Login Page: - Clean split layout - Right: login form (email, password, role selection) - Left: branding panel with: - App name + tagline (Safe • Fast • Verified) - 3 key features - Add scale + blur animation on load Booking UI: - Glassmorphism booking card with pickup/drop - Fare estimate and ETA - Smooth card transitions - Optional subtle route animation (moving car on line) Dashboard: - Rider → Light theme - Driver/Admin → Dark theme with peach highlights - Clean SaaS layout with cards and analytics 🧠 ADVANCED UX (BONUS FEATURES): 1. Skeleton Loading: - Add shimmer loading placeholders for cards, ride data, and dashboard widgets 2. Notification System: - Toast notifications with slide-in animation and auto-dismiss - Example: Ride booked, Driver arriving 3. Map Motion Feedback: - Simulate moving car along route line for better UX feedback 4. Stagger Animations: - Elements appear with slight delay for smooth flow (especially in lists/cards) ⚡ PERFORMANCE RULES: - Keep animations smooth and lightweight - Avoid excessive GSAP usage everywhere - Disable heavy animations on mobile devices - Optimize for fast load and responsiveness 🚫 AVOID: - Over-animations - Cartoon-style graphics - Too many bright colors - Cluttered UI 🎯 GOAL: Build a visually stunning, smooth, and modern ride-sharing web app that feels premium, interactive, and production-ready — similar to top startup websites.
